summary: PRE-W2 blocking gate: verify Agent tool model param controls dispatch before any dispatch code ships
Canonical names: fit_score=len(intersection), combined_score=fit_score*lbr — resolves G1 ambiguity
Normative pre-processing order: NFKC → frontmatter strip → fence strip → lowercase → regex; frontmatter strip prevents circular self-detection (G7)
M1 fix: default missing lineage field to claude at read time in _persona_score.py; no backfill required for MVP
M2 fix: each autorun gate shell depends on its own command file task only (spec-review.sh→spec-review.md, plan.sh→plan.md, check.sh→check.md)
SEC-01 security floor enforced at both _tier_assign.py config-load AND CLI --tier-pin parse site (G3 fix: CLI cannot be downgrade escape hatch)
SEC-02 mitigations: NFKC normalization + zero-width strip + balanced-fence regex in _tag_baseline.py; AST-banlist CI test
SEC-04: resolver re-runs _tag_baseline.py at every dispatch and asserts recorded_baseline is subset of recomputed; drift halts
Batch Python resolver work into one subprocess call per gate dispatch (not per-persona subprocesses); keep three separate files for testability
schemas/selection.schema.json is a new file that does not yet exist; must be W1 task blocking all W2+ work
Tag confirmation prompt: [security*, data*] with * marking baseline-locked; Enter accepts; typed list overrides; empty skips; autorun auto-accepts
Constitution rename carved to sibling spec monsterflow-pipeline-config-rename; all W1-W5 code reads constitution.md unchanged
Test target: ≥33 fixtures, <15s wall-clock (single normative number; resolves 50-70 vs 40-60 contradiction)
Drop A20 (pipeline cycle through itself) from AC list — not a real acceptance criterion
--tier-pin flag accumulates (not last-wins); promotes unselected persona, drops lowest combined_score (I6/G6 fix)
